title: TUI Phase 5: polish — mouse, command palette, clipboard
description: Mouse support (click tabs, scroll wheel), command palette (:q, :tab N, :refresh, :help), clipboard export (y key via pbcopy/xclip). Migrated from crosslink/ subdir issue #3.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
comments.content: [result] Phase 5 complete. All 5 TUI phases implemented. 123 TUI tests pass, clippy clean. Feature branch commits: Phase 1-2 scaffold, Phase 3 knowledge, syntax highlighting, Phase 4 milestones+config, Phase 5 polish.
